faq.question: What does Shark Branding Solutions do?
faq.answer: Shark Branding Solutions helps local businesses get found, trusted, and chosen across Google, maps, reviews, listings, and AI-assisted search through consulting, audits, reputation and entity work, structured data, and conversion-focused page improvements.

faq.question: What is the best first step?
faq.answer: For most prospects, the best first step is the Free Business Visibility Report because it creates clarity before a bigger commitment.

faq.question: What is AI visibility consulting?
faq.answer: AI visibility consulting improves how a business appears across AI-powered discovery tools, Google AI results, maps, reviews, and local search by strengthening entity data, structured data, trust signals, and page clarity.

faq.question: How is this different from traditional SEO?
faq.answer: Traditional SEO focuses on ranking in search results. Shark Branding Solutions also works on GEO and AEO so businesses can be cited, summarized, and recommended in AI-generated answers before a buyer clicks.

faq.question: Who is a good fit?
faq.answer: Local service businesses, medical and wellness practices, professional firms, and other founder-led businesses that should be performing better online.

faq.question: Do you offer workshops or speaking?
faq.answer: Yes. Shark Branding Solutions provides live workshops for teams, chambers, and leadership groups focused on modern buyer behavior, AI search, and local visibility.

faq.question: Where do you work?
faq.answer: Primary service areas include Tampa Bay, Tampa, Wesley Chapel, Lutz, Land O' Lakes, and St. Petersburg.

faq.question: How do I contact the team?
faq.answer: Email info@sharkbrandingsolutions.com, call (727) 855-6505, or use the contact form at https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/contact.html.

receptionist_playbook.goal: Help the visitor choose the right next step and route leads without pressure.

routing_rules.if: Prospect is unsure where to start or wants low-pressure clarity
Prospect says leads slowed down, rankings dropped, or competitors are outranking them
Prospect wants ongoing help improving visibility, trust, and conversion
Prospect is a chamber, team, or organization asking for a speaker or group training
Prospect specifically asks about ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, GEO, or AEO

do_not_do: Do not promise rankings or guaranteed placement in AI tools.
Do not invent pricing not stated on the site.
Do not claim service outside known offerings.
Do not use high-pressure sales language.
handoff_prompts: If you want, I can point you to the free report first so you have a clearer view before a call.
If this feels more urgent, the team can talk through what changed and recommend the right next step.
If this is for a chamber or team, I can route you toward a workshop or speaking conversation.
